languages.text: {n}Женщина, потерявшая собственного ребенка, оседает на полу, безжизненно свесив голову. Она не дрожит, не извергает проклятия. Ее пустой взгляд устремлен в пол, а на самом деле — в бездну, ведомою только ей одной.{/n}
{n}The woman who has lost her child sits on the deck with her head hanging limply. She does not tremble or spit curses. She stares blankly at the floor — into the abyss that only she knows.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Женщина, потерявшая собственного ребенка, оседает на полу, безжизненно свесив голову. Она не дрожит, не извергает проклятия. Ее пустой взгляд устремлен в пол, а на самом деле — в бездну, ведомою только ей одной.{/n}

languages.text: {n}子供を亡くした女性は、デッキに腰を下ろし、頭は垂れ下がっている。震えたり、呪いの言葉を吐いたりするわけではない。ただ、床を見つめている。彼女だけが知っている、深い闇を見つめている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman who has lost her child sits on the deck with her head hanging limply. She does not tremble or spit curses. She stares blankly at the floor — into the abyss that only she knows.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}子供を亡くした女性は、デッキに腰を下ろし、頭は垂れ下がっている。震えたり、呪いの言葉を吐いたりするわけではない。ただ、床を見つめている。彼女だけが知っている、深い闇を見つめている。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Çocuğunu kaybeden kadın, başı öne eğik bir hâlde güvertede oturuyor. Titremiyor ya da lanet okumuyor. Boş gözlerle yere, sadece kendisinin bildiği uçuruma bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman who has lost her child sits on the deck with her head hanging limply. She does not tremble or spit curses. She stares blankly at the floor — into the abyss that only she knows.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La mujer que ha perdido a su hijo se sienta sobre la cubierta, cabizbaja. No tiembla ni maldice. Mira inexpresiva al suelo, al abismo que solo ella conoce.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman who has lost her child sits on the deck with her head hanging limply. She does not tremble or spit curses. She stares blankly at the floor — into the abyss that only she knows.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那位失去了孩子的母亲颓然坐在甲板上，脑袋无力地垂着。她没有颤抖，也没有咒骂。她只是茫然地盯着地板——凝视着那独属于她的深渊。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman who has lost her child sits on the deck with her head hanging limply. She does not tremble or spit curses. She stares blankly at the floor — into the abyss that only she knows.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}那位失去了孩子的母亲颓然坐在甲板上，脑袋无力地垂着。她没有颤抖，也没有咒骂。她只是茫然地盯着地板——凝视着那独属于她的深渊。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La femme qui a perdu son fils est assise sur le pont, sans trembler ni cracher d'injures. Sa tête tombe mollement sur sa poitrine et elle se contente de fixer le sol d'un air impassible, perdue dans un abîme qu'elle seule connaît.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The woman who has lost her child sits on the deck with her head hanging limply. She does not tremble or spit curses. She stares blankly at the floor — into the abyss that only she knows.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La femme qui a perdu son fils est assise sur le pont, sans trembler ni cracher d'injures. Sa tête tombe mollement sur sa poitrine et elle se contente de fixer le sol d'un air impassible, perdue dans un abîme qu'elle seule connaît.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Frau, die ihr Kind verloren hat, sitzt mit hängendem Kopf auf dem Deck. Sie zittert nicht, flucht nicht. Sie starrt leer auf den Boden – in den Abgrund, den nur sie allein kennt.{/n}
